---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Jakub-Syrek
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see. Include CLI flags, API shape,
example inputs and outputs where applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Links to papers, similar tools, related issues, etc.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Code change in `src/`
- [ ] Tests in `tests/` (mocked where I/O is heavy)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / EXAMPLES / CHANGELOG)
